name: DeepSeek LLM 67B
license: DeepSeek Model License (custom, commercial use permitted)
archDisplay: Dense auto-regressive transformer decoder with grouped-query attention, 4K context
note: First general-purpose DeepSeek foundation model (dense, 7B/67B); 67B surpassed Llama 2 70B on code, math and reasoning.
tpsNote: 67B exceeds a single RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM even at Q4 (~39GB); no verified single-4090 llama.cpp benchmark found.

DeepSeek LLM 67B Chat average score, paper Table 8 (MT-Bench)

Open LLM Leaderboard v2 (HF lm-eval-harness 'leaderboard_gpqa' composite acc_norm, aggregating main/extended/diamond subsets) run on deepseek-llm-67b-chat, dated 2024-06-26. Independent third-party eval, not previously tracked (existing corpus entries for this model are all self-reported paper figures on different benchmarks). Fetched and confirmed directly from the unrestricted open-llm-leaderboard/results dataset JSON (the model-specific -details dataset is gated, but the raw results file mirrored into open-llm-leaderboard/results is public). [score corrected during round-12 accuracy re-verify: 31.6 -> 29.8, per verifier: Fetched raw results_2024-06-26T06-16-32.984312.json for deepseek-ai/deepseek-llm-67b-chat. The corpus's own 'gpqa' benchmark is explicitly defined in corpus/benchmarks.json as 'GPQA Diamond' -- and the sibling DBRX gpqa entry in this same corpus corr]
Open LLM Leaderboard v2, IFEval prompt-level strict accuracy = 0.5083 -> 50.8. Not previously tracked for this model.
Open LLM Leaderboard v2, MMLU-Pro 5-shot acc = 0.3944 -> 39.4. Not previously tracked for this model (only plain MMLU was tracked, from the paper).

verificationNotes: Confirmed release date 2023-11-29 via web search (multiple independent sources incl. MarkTechPost coverage dated 2023-12-04 referencing the late-Nov release). Confirmed via ar5iv/2401.02954: 67B dense model uses GQA (paper states 67B uses Grouped-Query Attention instead of MHA), 4096-token training context, and Table 6 literally shows Chat-67B scores HumanEval 73.8, GSM8K 84.1, MATH 32.6, MMLU 71.1, BBH 71.7 — all match exactly.
